name: 小红书种草图文

prompt_template.subject: {product_description}
prompt_template.quality: iPhone original camera aesthetic, NOT professional photography

defaults.scene: real home environment with daily items

overrides.scene: cozy living room or bedroom with soft natural light
morning bedroom scene, natural window light, coffee/tea setup
overrides.vibe: fresh start of the day, self-care ritual

overrides.scene: home office desk setup with laptop, plants, aesthetic desk accessories
bathroom or bedroom self-care moment, skincare routine
mirror selfie corner, clean aesthetic background
dining table or kitchen, natural food styling

category_tips.skincare: show texture application, glass skin effect achievable, before/after subtle
category_tips.fashion: natural pose, fabric detail, styling tips, accessorizing
category_tips.home-decor: real living space, not showroom, achievable aesthetic
category_tips.food: natural lighting, real portions, casual plating
category_tips.fitness: active but not intense, wellness focus, achievable results
category_tips.tech: daily use context, not tech studio, lifestyle integration
category_tips.furniture: real home integration, comfort focus, lived-in feel

examples: Authentic Xiaohongshu lifestyle photo. {product} in a cozy {scene} with soft natural window light. iPhone 14 Pro original camera aesthetic, slight warm color cast, visible minor imperfections, NOT professional photography, NOT retouched. The vibe is {vibe}, achievable aspirational lifestyle. Natural composition, slightly imperfect framing, product integrated naturally into daily life. 3:4 vertical aspect ratio for Xiaohongshu platform. Text overlay: 「{headline}」 in simple font at bottom

Xiaohongshu influencer sharing post. A {age}-year-old {persona} in their {scene}. The {product} naturally placed in the setting, showing real daily use. iPhone 14 Pro shot, natural lighting, Kodak Portra 400 color feel, visible skin texture, not smoothed. The mood is {vibe}. Caption placeholder 「{headline}」 at image bottom. 1080x1440px, Xiaohongshu standard format

anti_ai_tips.phone_model: iPhone 14 Pro / iPhone 15 Pro 原相机
anti_ai_tips.imperfections: 轻微噪点、毛孔可见、暖色偏移、不完美构图
anti_ai_tips.environment: 真实家居、略微凌乱、生活用品、水渍、用过的毛巾
anti_ai_tips.explicit_declare: NOT professional photography, NOT AI-generated look, NOT retouched, NOT smoothed
anti_ai_tips.avoid_words: 不要用 perfect, flawless, stunning, hyper-realistic

style_lock_fields.palette: 柔和自然色系 + 1个产品匹配强调色
